name: Platinum Maxima Plus Credit Card

domestic: 2 complimentary visits per quarter, unlocked by spending ₹35,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹2 Lakhs
10,000 additional bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹3.5 Lakhs
10,000 additional bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹5 Lakhs

milestoneBenefits: Earn 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of ₹2 Lakhs
Earn additional 10,000 bonus points on annual spends of ₹3.5 Lakhs
Earn additional 10,000 bonus points on annual spends of ₹5 Lakhs
additionalBenefits: Welcome benefit of 8,000 Reward Points upon card activation and payment of joining fee
Buy 1 Get 1 complimentary movie ticket free up to ₹200 every month on BookMyShow (on purchase of 2 or more tickets)
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit against the card bill.
No direct airline miles transfer — points are redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers through the RBL Rewards portal at ₹0.25 per point.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹150/month).

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14. Excluded categories (Fuel, Utilities, Insurance, Railways, Rental, Education, Wallet, Government) are also excluded from milestone calculations and lounge spend checks.
